item.name: False Classic Spectacles
item.description:
Wear these for a classic look of intelligence.*
* Glasses have no effect on actual intelligence. Generous bouts of silence may be advised. Though these were once considered a fashion accessory, trends are ever changing, and style enthusiasts now classify them as facewear. Use to unlock classic spectacles.

ornament.name: False Classic Spectacles
ornament.description: Don a pair of rectangular glasses for a classic illusion of intelligence.
